_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PANEL
name: Stationeers
author: eggs@goover.dev
description:
Dedicated server for Stationeers.
Stationeers puts you in control of the construction and management of a space station to run by yourself in single player, or online multiplayer with your friends. Complex atmospheric, electrical, manufacturing, medical, agriculture, and gravitational systems require your thought and management at all times!

startup_commands.Default: stty cols 80 rows 24; ./rocketstation_DedicatedServer.x86_64 -file start "{{STATION_NAME}}" {{WORLD_ID}} {{DIFFICULTY}} {{START_CONDITION}} {{START_LOCATION}} -logFile "./server.log" -settings StartLocalHost true ServerVisible true GamePort {{SERVER_PORT}} UPNPEnabled {{UPNP}} ServerName "{{STATION_NAME}}" ServerPassword "{{SERVER_PASSWD}}" ServerMaxPlayers {{MAX_PLAYERS}} AutoSave {{AUTOSAVE}} SaveInterval {{SAVE_INTERVAL}} ServerAuthSecret "{{SERVER_AUTH_SECRET}}" AutoPauseServer {{AUTO_PAUSE}} UseSteamP2P {{USE_STEAM_P2P}} LocalIpAddress 0.0.0.0 & tail -f server.log; 2>&1

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# steamcmd Base Installation Script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
# Image to install with is 'ghcr.io/parkervcp/installers:debian'

##
#
# Variables
# STEAM_USER, STEAM_PASS, STEAM_AUTH - Steam user setup. If a user has 2fa enabled it will most likely fail due to timeout. Leave blank for anon install.
# WINDOWS_INSTALL - if it's a windows server you want to install set to 1
# SRCDS_APPID - steam app id found here - https://developer.valvesoftware.com/wiki/Dedicated_Servers_List
# SRCDS_BETAID - beta branch of a steam app. Leave blank to install normal branch
# SRCDS_BETAPASS - password for a beta branch should one be required during private or closed testing phases.. Leave blank for no password.
# INSTALL_FLAGS - Any additional SteamCMD  flags to pass during install.. Keep in mind that steamcmd auto update process in the docker image might overwrite or ignore these when it performs update on server boot.
# AUTO_UPDATE - Adding this variable to the egg allows disabling or enabling automated updates on boot. Boolean value. 0 to disable and 1 to enable.
#
 ##

# Install packages. Default packages below are not required if using our existing install image thus speeding up the install process.
#apt -y update
#apt -y --no-install-recommends install curl lib32gcc-s1 ca-certificates

## just in case someone removed the defaults.
if [[ "${STEAM_USER}" == "" ]] || [[ "${STEAM_PASS}" == "" ]]; then
    echo -e "steam user is not set.\n"
    echo -e "Using anonymous user.\n"
    STEAM_USER=anonymous
    STEAM_PASS=""
    STEAM_AUTH=""
else
    echo -e "user set to ${STEAM_USER}"
fi

## download and install steamcmd
cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps # Fix steamcmd disk write error when this folder is missing
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

# SteamCMD fails otherwise for some reason, even running as root.
# This is changed at the end of the install process anyways.
chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server

## install game using steamcmd
./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login ${STEAM_USER} ${STEAM_PASS} ${STEAM_AUTH} $( [[ "${WINDOWS_INSTALL}" == "1" ]] && printf %s '+@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows' ) +app_update ${SRCDS_APPID} $( [[ -z ${SRCDS_BETAID} ]] || printf %s "-beta ${SRCDS_BETAID}" ) $( [[ -z ${SRCDS_BETAPASS} ]] || printf %s "-betapassword ${SRCDS_BETAPASS}" ) ${INSTALL_FLAGS} validate +quit ## other flags may be needed depending on install. looking at you cs 1.6

## set up 32 bit libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so

## set up 64 bit libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so
touch /mnt/server/server.log

## install end
echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "Installation completed..."
echo "-----------------------------------------"

variables.name: Auto Pause Server
variables.description: Weather the server should auto pause or not if no players are connected

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Determines if the server should automatically check for and install Steam updates upon startup

variables.name: AutoSave
variables.description: Enables or disables the periodic automatic saving of the world state

variables.name: Beta Branch
variables.description: Specify a Steam beta branch name (e.g., 'beta'). Leave empty for the standard stable version

variables.name: Difficulty
variables.description: Sets the survival challenge level. 'Stationeer' mode is the most realistic and punishing experience

variables.name: Map
variables.description: Select the planetary environment. Each world has unique temperatures, gravity, and atmospheric compositions

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: The maximum number of concurrent players allowed on the server

variables.name: Save Interval
variables.description: Time in seconds between each autosave. Shouldn't be below 60 sec.

variables.name: Server Auth Secret
variables.description: The administrative password used to authenticate as an admin via the in-game console

variables.name: Server Password
variables.description: If set, players will be prompted for this password to join the server

variables.name: Start Condition
variables.description:
Determines the starting scenario and the contents of the initial landing crate. Note: Venus is using
 VulcanBrutal & VulcanBrutalCommunity

variables.name: Start Location
variables.description: Highly depend on Map! Check trough https://stationeers-wiki.com/Dedicated_Server_Guide World types to get exact Location IDs

variables.name: Station Name
variables.description:
Name of the save of your world.
Auto save & auto load worlds on server startup.

variables.name: UPNP
variables.description: Enables automatic port forwarding on compatible routers. For dedicated hosting, this should generally stay false

variables.name: UseSteamP2P
variables.description: Weather the server should allow SteamP2P connections. Keep this disabled.
